strengths: 19 years of technical leadership at Staff level: Exceeds the 15-year requirement and demonstrates sustained progression into senior IC positions.
Current AI agent infrastructure expertise: Active work with MCP frameworks and agentic workflows directly addresses the role's core AI strategy focus.
Full-stack builder across cloud and infrastructure: AWS CDK, Kubernetes, microservices—demonstrates the required 'builder, code, and design fluency.'
concerns: Recent AI specialization: MCP and agentic workflows work is ~3 months old; prior 16+ years focused on general software and infrastructure.
No formal AI/ML credentials: Lacks the preferred Master's or PhD in AI; expertise is practitioner-derived rather than academic.
Limited strategic advisory track record: Resume shows strong execution but lacks demonstrated enterprise-scale strategic consulting experience.

key_factors.factor: Current hands-on AI agent infrastructure expertise
19+ years technical leadership at Staff level

response.justification: Bogdan brings 19 years of technical progression with current hands-on expertise in AI agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks—directly aligned with the role's AI strategy focus. His Staff-level history and proven builder fluency across AWS, Kubernetes, and microservices demonstrate both the seniority and execution capability required. While his AI work is recent and he lacks formal AI/ML credentials, his pragmatic approach to emerging platforms, entrepreneurial track record (GISCollective founder), and thought leadership through technical speaking position him as a capable practitioner ready to drive AI strategy innovation.
